title: AKH® Clear Suction Hooks | Pack of 20 | 2.2cm Rubber Sucker Pads with Metal Hook | Strong Hanging Hook for Christmas Hanging Decorations Signs Mirror Glass Kitchen Bathroom Wall Festivals Decorations
features: SET CONTAINS: 20 x Clear Suction Hooks.
PRODUCT DIMENSION: 2.2cm / 22MM / 0.9" Diameter each rubber sucker.

IDEAL FOR HANGING: Signs, Decorations, keys, kitchen utensils, towels, small toy pendants, window coverings and more. Especially for holiday decoration, light string, banner, flags, garland, and pendant arrangement.
SPECIAL FEATURES: Strong stainless steel. Waterproof & firm. Reusable, Easy to install, High-strength clear PVC, lightweight , temperature resistant.
